title: Eric Lampaert Zero Minus One
description: After a brush with total amnesia, a mind wiped clean, comedian Eric Lampaert returns from the void with questions only madness can answer, fractured memories, multiple personalities, and a darkly funny perspective on what it means to be “human”. “A real tour de force.” (National Operatic and Dramatic Association) “A galaxy of brilliant silliness. Lampaert is able to contort his body and voice in the most sinister of ways” (The Fest) “Provides a constant frisson of energy with his loose, animated style” (Chortle) “He makes it look so easy but this is a man with very funny bones. Definitely one to catch” (Daily Express)
